notes: 10 stranger-friend bios written. Each carries a header meta block (id, canon_player, playstyle_tag, status, tier, weapon, symbols, home_tf, signature_blurb) and three H2 sections (## Playstyle prose / ## Signature setup / ## Evolution history). Zero uses of 'ensemble' or 'aggregator'. Sae marked as disabled by default; Kunigami marked as retired-from-proposing.
review_criteria: Bios accurately describe actual behaviour in agent/squad/agents/*
Coaching notes from the last 30 days reflected where relevant
AI/ML confirms weapon strings match roster.py naming
